programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: How unlucky could one man be? His college sweetheart killed herself and fourteen years later, his wife ended her life in a similar way. Investigators had to determine if this was murder or simply a bizarre coincidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is reported missing after a fight with her husband. Police suspect a man who reported a fire in his car. Two tiny drops of blood are found in the interior. Finally, a tiny clue inside the suspect's watchband helps solve the case.

programme.desc: It's New Years Eve 1959 and 1960 is shortly due. In the final hours, Laverne's date cancels, Shirley's sick, and Lenny and Squiggy have a special plan for midnight outside the apartment building. Will Laverne leave the '50s in tears or cheers?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley rescues a white horse. The owner wants to send it to the glue factory, but Shirley seeks him a happy home. She gets Edna in trouble with a health inspector for having him in the apartment. Will it be greener pastures for Buttercup?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne busts a tooth but won't see a dentist. Shirley suggests her student dentist cousin Mikey. Laverne's hates the idea. Mikey has flunked before. Shirley gets her okay but once in the chair will Laverne truly feel safe in Mikey's hands?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Traveling to another city by bus for a blind date, the girls end up being ditched by two medical students who don't find them attractive - leaving the girls stranded overnight with no way home for over 12 hours.

programme.title: Happy Days

programme.title: Happy Days

programme.title: Happy Days

programme.title: Happy Days

programme.title: Happy Days

programme.title: Happy Days

programme.title: Happy Days

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne attends a Debutante Ball with Lenny when it's found out he's 89th in line to be a duke on the Polish throne.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: The only date - a blind one at that - Shirley finds to make Carmine jealous, is with a former classmate known as Eraserhead (an already balding, chubby, and weird guy). Is it really worth it to get even with Carmine for dating another?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy debates what to do when she receives money from an unexpected source.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cinco
programme.desc: El quinto día comienza con el chef Ramsay dando una lección a los concursantes restantes sobre el arte del sabor culinario.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día seis
programme.desc: Los seis chefs restantes preparan sus platos originales, y los dos equipos diseñan sus menús para la cena de la noche.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Dia siete
programme.desc: Los chefs deben trabajar como equipo por primera vez. El premio de este desafío es un viaje con el chef Ramsay al Red Rock Casino, Resort and Spa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día ocho
programme.desc: Con solo cuatro chefs restantes, la competencia se vuelve feroz. ¿Quién de ellos tiene lo que se necesita para ser el jefe de cocina del nuevo restaurante de Gordon Ramsay?

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día nueve
programme.desc: Los concursantes prueban el plato estrella del chef Ramsay y se les dan veinte minutos para reproducirlo. Las tensiones aumentan entre los chefs en medio de acusaciones de trampa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 1
programme.desc: Luego de una visita sorpresa de familiares, los concursantes restantes deberán diseñar sus propios restaurantes y jerarquías para el servicio final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 2
programme.desc: Desde el menú hasta la decoración, los dos finalistas deben demostrar su talento al chef Ramsay, ya que cada uno está a cargo de sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El tiránico Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa por tercer verano para enseñar y torturar a posibles Chefs. El ganador recibirá un trabajo de Chef en el resort Green Valley Ranch de Nevada.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos se enfrentan en un desafío de preparación de alimentos que recompensa a los ganadores por la oportunidad de pasar tiempo con el Chef Ramsay fuera de la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los concursantes restantes que preparen el desayuno para los miembros del servicio visitantes. El equipo ganador tendrá tiempo libre y los perdedores tendrán el rol de patrullar la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el cuarto día, los Chefs restantes compiten en una prueba de degustación con los ojos vendados. Los perdedores deben aceptar un castigo difícil mientras los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Para avanzar en este desafío, los siete Chefs restantes deben comprar y preparar la comida para la recepción de una boda.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Melissa se une a los hombres en una competencia para ver qué equipo puede preparar los mejores platos de langosta. Pero hay un problema: los equipos deben matar primero a sus crustáceos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis concursantes restantes deben preparar aperitivos y platos principales con las sobras, por lo que ambos equipos deben crear sus propios menús de cena.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: After starring in last year's hit play, Mike decides to skip this year's auditions and head to Broadway.

programme.title: Growing Pains

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Jason Seaver feels dispirited and useless until he meets a sad, scruffy young girl who needs his help.

programme.title: Growing Pains

programme.title: Growing Pains

programme.title: Growing Pains

programme.title: Growing Pains

programme.desc: Coach Lubbock's contract is up at the end of the semester, so Mike organizes a strike to keep his job.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Mike's graduation stirs memories from his proud parents, who recall his birth and first day of school.

programme.title: Growing Pains

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Maggie goes into labor on Ben's birthday, and he feels upset when the baby gets more attention than him.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Now that he feels too old to play by the family's house rules, Mike moves out of the house and into his car.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Mike converts the space above the garage into an apartment and must choose whether he wants to be a tenant.

programme.title: Growing Pains

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Carol is nominated for Homecoming Queen, but she questions whether she belongs in the contest.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Mike is embarrassed by the prize-winning picture he took for a photography class.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Ben throws himself a birthday party to invite his crush, there's one problem - it's not his birthday!

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Maggie goes back to work after the birth of her baby, Jason hires a college student to serve as a nanny.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A trip to Martha's Vineyard goes wrong when Mike and Julie are the only ones who make the ferry.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Carol meets a guy at the library and gets away with a late-night return home, but their date ends poorly.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A local women's group wants to give Maggie an award, but she's called to cover a strike before she can accept.

programme.title: Growing Pains

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Filadelfia, una lucha despiadada para hacerse con el poder condujo a una guerra de la mafia a gran escala. La familia del crimen de la mafia local se dividió en dos mientras los jóvenes y los mayores se enfrentaban a muerte.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A finales de los años ochenta, el FBI tuvo una batalla de inteligencia con un astuto ladrón de bancos. Él hacía una planificación meticulosa y ejecutaba sus crímenes con precisión militar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Shaq's Garage

programme.title: Shaq's Garage

programme.title: Shaq's Garage

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: When Shaq comes down with a cold, Paq decides to make him his mom's special chicken noodle soup to make him feel better./ Jimmy Extreme, the rude driver of a huge monster truck, becomes Gronk's hero after a chance meeting.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Queenie's O-ring goes bad and is scared that she won't be able to run. The Paq meets a wizard who brings them on a quest. / When Penny The Great shows everyone her magic trick called the Magic Box, Himari decides to play a joke on the Shaq Paq.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: After a fundraising picnic, Dawkins, Boone, and Himari stay behind to study a rare flower. / When Biggie D and Himari secretly watch the testing of a shrink ray, the ray misses the target and hits Biggie D.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Gronk decides that he wants to be a superhero, just like Shaq was in a movie the Paq watched. / When Pablo wins the chance at a day with a member of the Shaq Paq, Bates steps up to give him a day of fun.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: While Dr. Grease is inspecting an old steam locomotive, it takes off by itself down the track. Biggie D, Boone, Fleming, and Himari have to band together to overcome obstacles to get ahead of the runaway train and bring it to a stop.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: When a mother loses control of her baby stroller, the Shaq Paq works together to return her baby safe and sound / Biggie D enters a truck pull contest but soon realizes he'll need more training to win the gold!

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: The Shaq Paq is on a mission to save three baby cows who escaped their corral / Himari learns a lesson about confronting her fears while she and her friends watch a scary movie.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Someone has hacked Dawkins! It's up to the Shaq Paq to figure out who the culprit is and set things right before it's too late / Himari has an accident on the road and has to get repairs. Shaq tells a story from his youth to help her feel better.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 4 of 5. As the Island of no return battle rages on, Spirit goes one-on-one with Storm Shadow for the second weather dominator fragment. Meanwhile, in the freezing arctic battleground, both sides fight for the final fragment of the weather dominator.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 5 of 5. As the weather dominator device is reassembled at Cobra's Temple, it's up to the Jor team's full-scale assault on the base to prevent the world from falling into Cobra's grasp!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra seizes control of the G.I. Joe space shuttle, using the shuttle and a series of relay cubes to create a pyramid-like “zone” no vehicle or machine can function in.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Shipwreck and Snake Eyes continue to evade capture in an effort to get back to the Joe team with vital data about Cobra's control cubes.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: As three of Cobra's relay cubes are activated, Cobra commander moves forward with his plans to activate the fourth and final cube in the sea of lost souls. Meanwhile, Shipwreck and Snake Eyes escape Cobra's troopers in Enterprise City.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra commander activates the pyramid of darkness, stranding not only the JOES but also his comrades the crimson twins. Always prepared with a backup plan, Tomax and Xamot have other designs for the pyramid and Cobra.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Chaos ensues as the leaders of Cobra struggle for control of the pyramid of darkness. As Cobra forces battle each other, the Joe team is able to regain control of space station delta and launch a full-scale assault to try to destroy the Pyramid.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Zartan, disguised as a notable French scientist, infiltrates the worldwide defense center on a mission to destroy the facility for Cobra. He's planted a bomb, and now the clock is ticking… can the Joe team find and defuse the bomb before it's too late?

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra uses Tomax and Xamot's company extensive enterprises to purchase the Red Rocket food chain and use its location as a network of secret missile launching bases. But the JOE team catches on to the conspiracy.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When a secret military satellite is forced out of orbit by Cobra, the Joe team races to its location before Cobra can get their hands on it. But both the Joes and Cobra find that a third party has entered the battle for the device.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: In a diabolical plan to control the world's fuel supplies, Cobra begins detonating oil tankers and pipelines by remote. But when sparks uncovers the frequency Cobra is using to destroy the tankers, the Joe team may be able to turn the tables on them!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra plots to attack the cities of the world with lava flow when they kidnap Dr. Shakur and bring him to their jungle base, planning to use his breakthrough technology to harness the energy of Earth's core and cause volcanic eruptions.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 5 of 5. Destro returns to Cobra Mountain with Scarlett as his prisoner. As he takes control of the operation from Cobra Commander, the stakes are raised for the Joe team to stop them once and for all with an all-out assault on Cobra Mountain!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 5. Cobra attacks a G.I. Joe convoy and steals a high-powered experimental laser to complete their latest weapon... the weather dominator. When the Joes launch an air assault, Destro uses the device, and it's stormy skies ahead for the Joe team.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 5. The Joe team uses an energy mirror array to counter Cobra's Weather Dominator attack on Washington, D.C. When their defense is successful, the Weather Dominator explodes in orbit, scattering its vital components across the globe.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 3 of 5. The Joe team is preparing to trek across the globe to the Island of no return to retrieve one of the three fragments of the weather dominator before Destro and Cobra can get their hands on it.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja face off with an exhibit of a Stone Samurai Warrior that the toxic venom from the Great Devourer has brought to life while Garmadon manages to find a fabled Dark Island that is said to hold dark powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja try to flee from the rest of the Stone Army that has been brought to life by the Devourer’s toxic venom - and things get a lot worse when Garmadon arrives with a ‘Helmet of Darkness’ and seizes control of the Stone Army.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninjas, Lloyd, Sensei Wu and Misako journey to the Dark Island to find a ‘Temple of Light’ that can restore the Ninjas’ elemental powers but are attacked by Starteeth (barnacle-like star fish) that start eating through their ship.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After battling off Garmadon’s Stone Army, the Ninjas finally arrive at the Temple of Light where they harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd who becomes more powerful than he ever imagined.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninjas’ attempt to return Garmadon’s ‘Helmet of Darkness’ to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: A great darkness has fallen upon Ninjago as Garmadon’s Super-Weapon has turned it evil but Lloyd and the Ninjas discover that light is more powerful than dark - and the final and ultimate battle is on.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja go into hiding but an army of the Digtial Overlord’s evil robotic Nindroids are hunting them wherever they go.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The power is out in all of Ninjag, but the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord has disappeared. Some mysterious Stranger has stolen it and is now sending alternatively powered Nindroids to attack the Ninja and capture Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas’ search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd is free but Pythor and the Overlord are nowhere to be found. However the Ninja have a cryptic clue to their next plan - something called Codename: Arcturus. But what is it?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago it is time for the final battle with the reborn, god-like Overlord. The stakes have never been greater and one ninja must make the ultimate sacrifice to try to stop his reign of destruction

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago it is time for the final battle with the reborn, god-like Overlord. The stakes have never been greater and one ninja must make the ultimate sacrifice to try to stop his reign of destruction

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninja receive an invitation to partake in the Tournament of Elements and a clue that Zane might be alive, they accept and travel to a Lost Island owned by notorious crime lord Master Chen in order to save their friend.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.”

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In order find Zane, the Ninja stay in the tournament to get past the first round but Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen pits everyone against each other in a ludicrous roller skating event called Thunderblade and all contestants team up against the Ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja have a secret alliance of elemental fighters, Cole has found Zane and Nya is a spy within Chen’s Kabuki to figure out what nefarious plot Chen is up to.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nya has proof of Chen’s plan but he entices the contestants to hunt her down with promises to advance the winner, forcing the Ninja in a race to get to her first.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After stealing the remaining contestant’s powers, Chen only needs Lloyd’s power to complete the spell and knowing his daughter has feelings for Kai, Chen tries to enlist the Fire Ninja by promising to share secrets about his parents.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen has failed to bring the return of the Serpentine War but Clouse reveals there’s another way – his daughter has the ability to absorb the power of every fighter she comes across, so she can complete the ceremony.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja reunite with Wu and turn to the aid of a shrunken Pythor in order to figure out how to defeat the unstoppable Anacondrai.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja and fighters discover there’s a strategic location called The Corridor of Elders where they can make their last stand against Chen’s Anacondrai army... but even with the new Destiny Bounty, their forces still aren’t strong enough.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai promises to watch over Lloyd when Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain– but when Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm, Lloyd goes on a solo mission…

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu’s staff, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn’t keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja hear of another way to learn Airjitzu - from the ghost of Sensei Yang at his haunted temple - but there’s a warning; if you are trapped in it by sunrise, you will become a ghost, too.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Now that the Ninja know Airjitzu, they get briefed about how the next stage to finding the tomb is to get ‘The Sword of Sanctuary’ from Cloud Kingdom, which can only be reached from the top of the Wailing Alps.

programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Massive riches have been hidden inside Tsukikage Castle. Lupin and his gang must decipher a code to find out the whereabouts of this great treasure. Wii Lupin be able to locate the treasure before his rivals do?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen head to Mongolia in search of Genghis Khan's treasures. Meanwhile, Goemon is visiting his ancestor's grave to pay his respects when he encounters Fujiko, who is in search of Yoshitsune Minamoto's buried treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The ICPO chief promises to erase Fujiko's criminal record in exchange for her cooperation in arresting Lupin. Up against an ego-bruised Inspector Zenigata and a determined Fujiko, have Lupin's heisting days come to an end?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen sneak on board a ship smuggling diamonds. However, what they find on board are several thousand chickens! Lupin and his gang infiltrate the Hong Kong smuggling boss's lair where diamonds are being illicitly sold…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal a suitcase containing Costa Rican diamonds, but the contents turns out to be Inspector Zenigata. The real diamonds are being shipped to Puerto Rico inside a missile and Lupin must find out the precise launch time to intercept it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Kaguya, a beautiful woman, separately asks Lupin, Jigen and Goemon to gather the tears of the Yeti, a mermaid's scale, and the liver of a dragon so she can make a secret potion.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A wealthy shipping magnate and also a bachelor, Onabes' final voyage is nothing short of extravagant, with a ship full of beautiful women and fine art. Things go as planned when Lupin infiltrates the ship disguised as a woman…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is in Hong Kong for a vacation when he is asked to find a woman in return for helping him escape from Inspector Zenigata. Lupin discovers the pickpocket who stole his wallet is the daughter of the woman he is looking for…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Sleeping Lion, a statue made of solid gold, is being transported to a museum by a specially armored, airtight car. Lupin steals the armored car together with the statue and nearly asphyxiated Inspector Zenigata inside.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal crime boss Mulligan's precious jewels, only have them stolen from him by Fujiko! Mulligan, unaware that Fujiko has his jewels, hires a skilled gunman named Hangman to take them back from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has been put on auction at the Wanted Club and Dr. Mad places the winning bid. Dr. Mad also purchases Fujiko and Jigen from the auctions. The three are abandoned on a deserted island with killer cyborgs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has his eyes on the royal family's Imperial State Crown, but thanks to Scotland Yard's Inspector Dover, stealing it won't be easy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin announces he's going to steal the betting takes at the Kentucky Derby, but the heist fails. However, it's all part of the plan. Lupin's main target is really the Metropolitan Bank's underground vault.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: After several divorces and a couple of deceased husbands, Jacqueline has amassed a fortune and a collection of impressive jewels. In a twist of fate, Lupin and Jacqueline become close... Too close for Jigen and Goemon's comfort…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: An illicit auction selling smuggled treasures is taking place. Lupin targets the auction. In the process, Lupin discovers the auctioneer is Cornelia, the woman he once loved who died saving his life…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is reunited with Cornelia, a woman who died by her father's hands to save Lupin's life. However, Cornelia's memories of Lupin have been erased. Her father is Dr. Zel, a Nazi who has succeeded in resurrecting corpses and controlling them.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko discovers that the Holy Scripture for Immortality is hidden within the jungles of Thailand. However, Emmanuelle Poirot, a cold-hearted beauty, is after them too.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Phantoma Mark III, grandson of the mysterious master thief and disguise artist Phantoma, who terrorized Europe during his heyday, is plotting to take over the world…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The aging Inspector Hanshichi Mikawa, who failed to capture Lupin 10 years ago, is viewed as a nuisance by his peers at the downtown police station. Lupin has announced he'll be stealing the golden Kannon statuette.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have stolen the "36 Views of Mt. Fuji," a famous series of 46 woodblock prints, from the exhibition hall. However, a gang calling itself the Shiranami Five challenges Lupin head-on by stealing one of the prints from him.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Goemon, siding with the Shiranami Five, challenges Lupin to a one-on-one duel. While Goemon keeps Lupin busy, the Shiranami Five steals the 36 Views, but one of its members, Kikuko Benten, betrays her gang and escapes with the loot.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On a wild whim, Inspector Zenigata swipes a throwing coin owned by his great Edo-era ancestor, Heiji Zenigata while he's viewing the inside of an incredible new safe protected by Professor Hunter's super computer.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are after the Aurora Droplet, a diamond adorning a prima ballerina's tiara. During the heist, Jigen is wounded and in a twist of fate, is saved by Monica, the prima ballerina.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: After shaking off Inspector Zenigata's pursuit, Lupin is stopped by a monstrously huge Fujiko on his way home! The giant Fujiko turns out to be an illusion created by Madame X. Lupin learns Madame X's hobby is collecting famous people.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Bandit leader Basara is determined to sniff out the location of the diamonds Lupin has hidden somewhere in India. Armed with his sinister invention, the Suicide Ray Gun, he tries to make Lupin talk, even trying his luck with a fake Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Trouble is all but guaranteed when a crime boss and an arms merchant join hands. The two set their eyes on Goemen's sword, which can split a tank in half! After hiring Fujiko to steal it, they transform the sword into an invincible flying weapon of war.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen and Gomen have sent a letter saying they are being held captive in a small but terrifying village. Lupin arrives in the village to rescue them, but Jigen and Goemon are acting oddly.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/15/86: The Astros scored three runs in the 1st inning and took the lead deep into the 9th, until the Mets retaliated with three runs to send the game into extras.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/25/86: Astros ace Mike Scott strikes out 13 and tosses no-hitter against the Giants to lift Houston to a 2-0 victory and the National League West title.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: Ichiro Suzuki makes history in 2007 by hitting the first ever inside-the-park home run during an All-Star Game. He was rewarded MVP for going 3-for-3 at the plate and collecting two RBIs in an American League victory, 5-4.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/25/87: Greg Gagne, Kirby Puckett, and Tom Brunansky each recorded two hits and Frank Viola struck out seven batters in eight innings to help clinch the Twins' first-ever World Series title over the Cardinals.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/23/88 - The Yankees headed to the bottom of the 9th down 4-3 to the Red Sox. Rickey Henderson helped orchestrate the tying run and give New York hope. Bases loaded and two outs, Claudell Washington scored the winning run on an error by Jody Reed.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Warrior Of The Lost World
programme.desc: A nameless hero and his talking motorcycle fight an evil dictator in a post-apocalyptic world.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: Greedy sailors capture a giant lizard off the coast of Ireland and sell it to a London circus. Then its mother shows up.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Untamed Youth
programme.desc: Joel invents a pipe with a smoke detector and a sprinkler system built in for the invention exchange. The guys watch a 1950s teen flick about youths sentenced to manual labor at a cotton farm.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: Stay safe with this informative short about occupational hazards.

programme.title: MST3K: Munchie
programme.desc: Jonah's crew watch as a child befriends MUNCHIE (1992). Jonah refuses to go back into the theater and suffers the consequences.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Beginning of the End
programme.desc: A swarm of giant grasshoppers, inadvertently created by a radioactive experiment, heads for Chicago.

programme.title: MST3K: The Creeping Terror
programme.desc: Mike and the 'bots watch The Creeping Terror (1964), with its infamous walking-carpet monster, and parody Love, American Style (1969).

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: Bela Lugosi stars as Dr. Zorka, inventor of a lethal mechanical spider.

programme.title: MST3K: The Million Eyes Of Sumuru
programme.desc: Jonah's crew watch an evil woman bent on world domination in THE MILLION EYES OF SUMURU (1967). The bots realize Jonah is tall.

programme.title: MST3K: Track Of The Moon Beast
programme.desc: In Track of the Moon Beast (1976), a mineralogist is hit by a meteor which causes him to transform into a lizard-monster.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: La Ceremonia de Elección se prende fuego después de que una travesura en la casa se convierte en un tema central entre los solteros, trayendo problemas para una persona en especial.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: Casa de playa, sol, verano… Nueva semana, nuevos conflictos. Mientras las solteras se rifan al agua para vencer la prueba y garantizar un puesto en la salida, Rudo lanza su veneno y el lío está hecho. La casa se vuelve contra él.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: En "Are You The One? El Match Perfecto" otro liderazgo empieza a lucir, importante influencia para la votación de la Cabina de la Verdad. Los ganadores de la prueba disfrutan de su paseo radical y intentan practicar wakeboarding.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: En este episodio, llega el gran momento que todos esperaban, finalmente la pareja Connie y Clovis va enfrentar la Cabina de la Verdad y probar su amor ¿Cuál será su reacción? Angie aprovecha una pausa en el juego para declararse a Victor.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: En la casa de playa, Mariana y Cristóbal todavía siguen peleados, cosa que para algunos de los solteros puede significar una posibilidad de acercarse. Por otra parte, Dianey y Victor se quedan más cerca que nunca. Vadhir Derbez visita a los solteros.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: ¡Final de fiesta, ánimos exaltados! Hay besos calientes, baile sensual y llanto. Daniel escoge su preferida para una relación de "amistad con derechos" y Adrian muestra que más que elegir, es necesario rifarse.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: Aunque se prendieron pocas luces en la últiuma Ceremonia de Elección, los solteros creen que han dado un gran paso para descubrir al menos uno de los matches perfectos. Mientras platican, los humores suben de tono por los famosos chismes.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: Las tres parejas ganadoras de la prueba despiertan temprano para conocer los corales brasileños en un paseo precioso por las piscinas naturales brasileñas. A parte de los paisajes, un nuevo villano es descubierto y un inocente juego lleva los chavos

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: En "Are You The One? El Match Perfecto", de los encuentros más improbables pueden surgir cálidas amistades, así como las amistades más sólidas pueden traer conflictos inesperados.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: La cita romántica para una pareja de suerte y una fiesta llegan a la casa de los solteros y solteras más atractivos de Latinoamérica. Muchos tragos pueden aflorar nuevos y antiguos sentimientos haciendo un cambio 180º en toda la historia.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: Las estrategias son puestas a la mesa en más una polémica Ceremonia, desatando grandes sorpresas amorosas al mismo tiempo que un plan de venganza contra el "cocodrilo" de la casa se pone en marcha.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: En la Ceremonia, Adrian ha perdido una batalla pero la guerra solo está por empezar. La casa se desestabiliza cuando una atracción secreta es revelada. Buena puntería y coraje son como combustible en la prueba de esta semana.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: Dos parejas tienen la oportunidad de conocer la gastronomía brasileña en más una salida. En la noche, Connie y Cristóbal juntan sus habilidades para jugar al Beerpong contra la casa, hasta que el alcohol despierte los celos de algunos.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: Vadhir vuelve a la casa para anunciar más una cabina donde muchos confían que la pareja elegida es una luz segura.

programme.title: Voices of Valor

programme.title: Bubble Guppies

programme.title: Bubble Guppies

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Molly and Gil get the opportunity to see how bubblecakes are made when they step into Chef Stef's kitchen.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: When the evil robot Major Bummer tries to eliminate music from the galaxy, Princess Molly and the Guppies must restore peace, harmony and melody.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Excited that Zooli is getting a new pet, the Guppies try to guess what kind of animal it is; Zooli loves many creatures, so her new pet could be anything in the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Gil and his friends attend a basketball game played by elephants.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Zooli and her crew of marine biologists escort their new friends Baby Shark and his pilot fish, William, to visit Baby Shark's great-great-great-great-great Uncle Slow Mo and help them escape the determined fisherman who's chasing them.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: When some untidy Titans (played by Guppies) start messing up Zooli, Nonny and Oona's goat farm, the goat herders must journey to the Titans' cloud realm to ask them to tidy up.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Deema must turn over a new leaf and try broccoli if she wants to earn her broccoli badge at scout troop initiation.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: All is not well in the normally well-rested Kingdom of Sleepwell because Princess Deema can't fall asleep; her royal court comes to her aid, but even magic doesn't work.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: City-slicker umbrella sellers Molly and Gil set up shop in the Amazon rainforest.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: When Bubble Puppy disappears after biting an ancient magic bone, the Guppies must embark on an adventure to find him.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: When Molly and Gil find a lost kitten named Bubble Kitty, they help take the cat home to Meownt Rushmore.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Dirty Deema steals Molly and Gil's soap and makes the Kingdom of Clean very dirty; Molly and Gil have to get their soap back and clean up the kingdom.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: When Nonny breaks his glasses, he must use his other senses to reach the glasses store.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Ninjas Zooli and Oona are excited for their first mission: escorting snow monkey Moshi up Mt. Danger to join his troop; but it won't be easy: a storm looms, and mischievous Moshi is causing trouble.

programme.desc: When Nonny, Gil and Zooli conjure a genie, she agrees to grant a wish to whoever brings her the most precious gift.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Jesters Goby and Gil arrive in the Kingdom of NeverLaugh, where King Grumpfish decrees that he'll outlaw laughter if no one can make him laugh before sundown.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies

programme.title: Bubble Guppies

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Robot Mechanic Molly and Robo Puppy must stop a bossy cyborg named the Glitch when it hacks all of the robots in Robotopolis and forces them to dance "The Robot."

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde quieren ser recordados por siempre en la escuela, por ello se proponen colarse en las fotografías de todos los grupos; Lincoln sugiere a sus hermanas que se sometan a un test de compatibilidad porque están siempre discutiendo.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Clyde está preocupado porque Lincoln está triste y trata de animarlo; Lucy utiliza un libro de hechizos para darles a sus hermanos una lección.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La familia Loud cree que está a salvo de las bromas del Día de los Inocentes porque el bromista Luan se encuentra de campamento; cuando los niños descubren que su padre ya no está en el trabajo antiguo, creen que puede ser su culpa.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde descubren que "ARGGH" viene a la ciudad y deciden ir a la grabación. Cansada de sus hermanos, Lori se muda al garaje, pero rápidamente descubre que es más de lo que esperaba.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Para desviar la atención de sus padres sobreprotectores, Clyde arregla todo para que un estudiante de intercambio se quede con ellos. Lola toma a una nueva compañera de clases tímida bajo su protección y la transforma en una mariposa social.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Después de conocer a una familia admirable, los padres Loud temen que sus hijos no estén haciendo lo suficiente como para asegurarse un futuro exitoso; los hermanos deciden asociarse para eliminar a Lynn.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln enseña a sus hermanas cómo pedir dinero a sus padres; Lisa tiene problemas para relacionarse socialmente y esto repercute en sus notas académicas, así que si quiere mejorar en la escuela necesita demostrar a sus maestros que tiene amigos.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Cuando Luan escucha por casualidad a sus hermanos quejándose de su comedia, ella decide abandonarla; los niños deciden no contarle a Leni sobre la próxima fiesta de su madre.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y su papá van a "Leyendas del Templo Oculto" y no pueden esperar ni un minuto para pasar un día juntos entre padre e hijo; Lincoln quiere ir al centro comercial, pero tiene que cuidar a sus hermanas menores, por lo que decide llevarlas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La familia participa en un concurso de lectura en la biblioteca, pero Lola no quiere unirse. Lincoln sospecha que sus padres le ocultan algo sobre sus orígenes cuando descubre que su álbum de bebé tiene la primera página totalmente en blanco.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Los niños le dan un viejo muñeco que canta a Lily para detener su llanto, pero rápidamente los vuelve locos; los chicos intentan convencer a Papá de la nueva tecnología cuando le declara la guerra a los dispositivos electrónicos.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln quiere el sofá para ver su programa favorito, pero sus hermanas no le dejan; Lincoln le deja un mensaje a Lori en su correo de voz, pero se arrepiente enseguida y busca la manera de eliminarlo antes de que Lori lo escuche.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln está cansado de que sus hermanas se entrometan en su vida, pero su opinión cambia cuando se burlan de él en la escuela; Lincoln graba los momentos más embarazosos de sus hermanas.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Finalmente cansado de hacer favores para que Lori pasee, Lincoln decide ayudar a Leni pasar su prueba de conducción; Lincoln y nueve de sus hermanas trabajan en equipo para frustrar la tiranía que enfrentan con Lori como su niñera.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln tiene el plan de sentarse en el mejor asiento del carro para el largo viaje. Él debe probar que está lo suficientemente maduro como para sentarse en la mesa con los adultos.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln debe apurar a sus hermanas para no llegar tarde a la escuela; Lincoln consigue la aprobación decisiva para las vacaciones familiares.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln hace todo lo posible por no oír a sus hermanas; Lynn se pelea con Lucy y Lincoln deja que Lynn pase la noche en su cuarto.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln quiere capturar la fotografía perfecta de su familia como obsequio para sus padres por motivo de su aniversario de bodas; Lincoln hace una apuesta con sus hermanas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La nueva piscina de Lincoln resulta demasiado pequeña y él y sus diez hermanas no pueden usarla al mismo tiempo; Lincoln trata de manipular a Lily para que crezca desarrollando la mentalidad que a él le agrada, no como sus otras hermanas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln invita a Clyde a una fiesta de pijamas, pero se pone celoso cuando Clyde quiere pasar tiempo con sus hermanas; Lincoln escucha a escondidas a sus padres y piensa que han decidido deshacerse de sus hijos.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lori le regala a Lincoln una bicicleta rosa de segunda mano, pero como siente vergüenza de que lo ven llevándola, le quita a Lori sin decirle a nada su bicicleta BMX; Lincoln investiga por qué el inodoro está atascado.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln derrama uno de los experimentos de Lisa, desencadenando una reacción en cadena en toda la casa; Lincoln trata de animar a la familia a dejar de usar tanta electricidad.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln tiene que cuidar la tarántula de la clase; Lincoln decide ir a la huelga hasta que alguien cambie deberes con él.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln va a su primer concierto de rock junto a Luna, quien está decidida a hacerle pasar un momento inolvidable; cuando Lincoln encuentrra un sobre en el ático cree que se trata de un fajo de billetes oculto por alguien de la casa.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln entrena a Lana para que sustituya a Lola en un concurso, ya que Lola está enferma; Lincoln y Clyde creen que será sencillo hacer de niñeros de Lilly, pero no lo es.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln tiene las manos ocupadas cuando sus diez hermanas le piden cubrirlas en el mismo día; Bobby y Lori van en una cita doble con Lincoln y la pequeña hermana de Bobby, Ronnie Anne.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln comienza a pasar mucho tiempo en casa de Clyde, porque el padre de éste le presta más atención que su propio padre; Lincoln se monta en una limosina, y después de haber probado el sabor de la buena vida, su actitud cambia.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La familia de Lincoln forma una banda cuando él se inscribe para un concurso de talentos; la madre de Lincoln le ofrece llevarlo a la oficina dental en la que ella trabaja, mientras que sus hermanas van a trabajar con su padre.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: El Día de los Inocentes, Luan gasta bromas a toda la casa, pero Lincoln este año tiene un plan para evitar caer en ellas; los hermanos Loud van juntos al supermercado a hacer la compra para su mamá, pero Lincoln tiene un plan alternativo.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde tienen que empezar un negocio, como parte de una tarea escolar, así que comienzan a ganar dinero con la experiencia de Lincoln tratando con chicas; los miembros de la familia Loud se venden los unos a los otros en una subasta.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde van de acampada para recuperar su hombría perdida; Lincoln consigue a Lori un empleo en una sala de videojuegos que además es pizzería, pero Lori se mete en problemas cuando Lincoln comienza a pedirle favores.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Aunque su madre le obliga, Lincoln no quiere jugar al fútbol americano, pero él tiene un plan para que Lynn lo sustituya; Licoln se vuelve un hipocondríaco después de que Lucy le augure que su día terminará en un desastre.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Las hermanas de Lincoln accidentalmente le arreglan cuatro citas para el baile Sadie Hawkins en la escuela; cuando Lincoln y Bobby se hacen amigos, Lori se dispone a poner a Bobby celoso pasando el tiempo con Clyde.

programme.desc: Cleo and Emma meet new girl, Rikki, and find themselves stuck on Mako Island where they are transformed into mermaids. As well as growing tails, the girls find they have powers over water.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Annoying Miss Popularity, Miriam, is having a pool party and the girls want to go. But being around water is risky, especially when Zane tosses Cleo into the pool. Lewis is the only one around to help so he finds out their secret.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Rachel wants to know whether her boyfriend is too good to be true. Letisse says her cab-driving boyfriend drove another woman around town for 10 hours.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Buddy spends his days smoking and playing videos games, rather than providing for his family. His girlfriend Holly works to provide for everyone including their special needs child, but is fed up!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Chris claims that Brianna's very controlling and doesn't let him go out to do the things that make him happy. Then, Chad is here to propose to his girlfriend Star but before they book the caterer, Star has a little confession to make.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Mary busts her husband Bill him in bed with her cousin, Elizabeth. Next, Katie is 4 months pregnant and must tell her fiance that she's been cheating with a woman. Then, Mia says her male co-workers stole her girlfriend.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: A man has an affair with his fiancee's friend; a woman confronts her husband and his mistress; a man tries to mend his relationship with his wife; a man sees another woman after his wife's family kicks him out of their house.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jon wants to start fresh and come clean to his fiancee about his secret affair. But first, his secret lover, Kirn, has some news for him! Then Racquel doesn't know why she's here, but when the babysitter arrives, she figures it out in a hurry!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Desiree and Kim have been dating Chango for 6 years! Next Mark's ex wants him back and even lied about a pregnancy. Today she will be confronted by Mark and his new girlfriend!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Can Kim get rid of her husband's meddling ex-lover? Next Daron says he loves his girlfriend, Jessica, but has never fully ended his relationship with his ex, Sarah. Then Tammy wants her boyfriend, Dave, to stop sleeping with his old girlfriend.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Bev will see her son for the first time in 7 years and find out why he left! Then Joyce suspects that her granddaughter is prostituting out of their home! Later Jenna confesses to her girlfriend, Stephanie, that she's been cheating with her mother!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Misty hates her best friend's newlywed man so much that she's willing to pay for the divorce. Lucus is ready to divorce his wife of 6 weeks if her family doesn't stop meddling!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Willy used to be a cheating dog, but now his girlfriend has turned the tables on him. Next Scott and his wife used to have threesomes with Scott's best friend, Junior. But then Karen left her husband to be with Junior.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Josh and Amy will find out today that their partners have been unfaithful. Next Madeline reveals to Andre that she's been sleeping with Diante. Then Quincy is engaged to Callie but she doesn't know that Quincy has been cheating with Amy.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Nicole wants her boyfriend back but only if he'll end his threesome. Next Mesha's been in love with her husband's best friend, Jamie, for four years, but she won't take "No" for an answer.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Kiki and Kat were coworkers who fell in love. But now Kat is dumping Kiki for a man! Later Cedric is here to tell his girlfriend that he wants to take their relationship to another level…and person!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sheroya tiene 17 años y se esfuerza por criar a 2 niños mientras sale de fiesta sin parar. Su novio Malcolm suele ser infiel y la maltrata verbalmente. Steve tiene mucho trabajo por delante con esta pareja, pero ¿alguno de ellos despertará?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Everett tocó a la hija de su novia Michelle? Su ex Robert dice que su hija de 7 años lo contó. ¡Everett se someterá a una prueba con el detector de mentiras para desmentirlo! ¡No te pierdas estos resultados impactantes!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Marlo tocó a su hija con Sandra cuando ella tenía 7 años? Ha evitado confrontarla durante casi 10 años, pero hoy, Sandra no se irá hasta que no se sepa la verdad y se haga justicia por su hija.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Steve está celebrando otra reunión de chicas adolescentes para tratar los problemas más importantes a los que se pueden enfrentar todas las adolescentes, incluyendo el uso de drogas, el abuso físico y los agresores en Internet.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sherry fue atacada a los 15 años y se escapó de su casa. Quiere que Steve la ayude a reunirse con su madre. Después, la hija adolescente de Dawn, Cathy, dio a luz recientemente, pero vive asustada por el desempleado e inestable padre del bebé, Nick.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¡Kristy quiere que su madre, Donna, le devuelva su bebé! Donna afirma que se llevó al bebé porque nació con graves discapacidades debido a que Kristy consumió drogas durante el embarazo. ¿Quién está mintiendo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Aeshia ha venido a demostrar a Terrence y a su esposa Lashondra que Terrence es el padre de su hijo, pero Lashondra sabe que se equivoca. Tanto Shaunah como Chris se han convencido de que les son infieles. ¿Quién es el padre?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La relación de dos años de Anastasia y Robert terminó cuando él escuchó rumores de que ella le era infiel. Ella dice que siempre le ha sido fiel, pero Robert no le cree y ahora duda que sea el padre de su bebé recién nacido.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Stephanie dice que desde que llegó a casa del trabajo y encontró a su hijo de un año con un ojo morado, ha temido que la niñera de sus hijos los lastime. La niñera Cheryl niega las graves acusaciones acerca del niño.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Thornton dice que no puede confiar en su novia infiel Crystal y quiere que se someta al detector de mentiras. Además, Stephanie quiere demostrarle a su marido, Mathew, que no está teniendo sexo con un miembro de su familia.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Deshawn afirma que su ex Lynette abandonó a su hijo de 5 años. Pero ella afirma que él la está alejando de su hijo. Sin embargo, Deshawn se enteró recientemente de que no está en el certificado de nacimiento de su hijo, ¡así que quiere una prueba de ADN!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Stephanie dio a luz a un niño y cree que Brandon es el padre. Pero Brandon afirma que no supo del niño hasta tres años después y niega ser el padre. Stephanie y su mamá quieren que Brandon se haga cargo.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Megan quería saber si su novio Devin era infiel. ¡Pero salieron a la luz secretos de relaciones aún peores! Además, te sorprenderá saber por qué Laura y Steven necesitan que Steve los ayude otra vez.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Desmond cree que su ex, Cassandra, está inventando todo un cuento de que él ha tocado a su hijo porque está celosa de su nueva prometida. Después, Tammy ha sido investigada por abuso infantil e incluso acusada de encerrar a sus hijos en un armario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Cuando Fidela habla con Luis Mario y le cuenta la historia de su hija, ella se da cuenta que se trata del padre de Angeliquita. Mayrita trata de tranquilizar a Teobaldito.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio le exige a Mercedes que no vuelva a su casa pero Rosaura se le enfrenta y le dice que ella se marchará con su familia para siempre.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura se sorprende muchísimo cuando Fidela le dice que dios hará el milagro de salvar a su hija. Patricio se niega a cenar y cuando Camelia le pregunta dice que no sabe nada de Sonia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En la clínica todos están consternados por el accidente de Caridad. Al rato llega Luis Mario y Bruno, quienes cuentan que Caridad tenía algo muy importante que decirle.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Marybella y Eduarda celebran la noticia que Silvano y Rosaura se van a casar, ya que de esta manera Rosaura se irá de la vida de Luis Mario. Mientras tanto Doña Cruz trata de reprender a los niños.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura entra a la habitación de la clínica donde está Angeliquita y le pregunta a la enfermera que dijeron los médicos y ella le responde que la niña se está recuperando satisfactoriamente.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luisana encuentra a Eduarda y le pregunta porque esta ahí con Caridad. Eduarda disimulando su plan le dice que está visitándola por la salud de Caridad y que ella la quiere como una nana.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Caridad le va a contar todo a Luis Mario pero en ese momento llega la enfermera y le dice a Luis Mario que Caridad se encuentra muy mal y que por el momento no puede hablar porque se agita mucho.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio, acompañado de Camelia, se encuentra con Luis Mario y Marybella en la borda de un barco. Allí Patricio aprovecha la oportunidad de descargar su ira tocando el punto débil de Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Jimena despide a Guillermo en el hospital donde esta Caridad hospitalizada y en ese momento llega Iván y los ve besándose, mientras Silvano le dice a Luisana que Rosaura termino con él.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura y Luis Mario siguen discutiendo, mientras que Silvano los observa desde lejos. Luisana y Bianca se compadecen de la situación que está viviendo Jimena.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Rebecca has precious little time to follow Luffy's lead and make it to Kyros. Can she make it in time? Meanwhile, Fujitora is closing in on Bartolomeo and the other Colosseum warriors while Trafalgar Law faces the shadows of his past!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law and Sengoku share memories of Corazon, and the secret of Trafalgar Law's name. Meanwhile, Fujitora uses the destruction caused by the battle in Dressrosa as a weapon, and squares off one-on-one with Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The people of Dressrosa show their appreciation to the Straw Hats one last time by foiling Fujitora's strategy. As Luffy and the others are able to finally make their break from the island, however, an unbelievable new chapter opens in the story.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With newfound allies won in the battle at Dressrosa, and as the Navy watches, Luffy and the Straw Hats depart Dressrosa for open water. But will Luffy accept the oath of allegiance given by his new fleet?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the Straw Hats are underway, Doflamingo has serious predictions for the upset of the world order! Meanwhile, the recent actions in Dressrosa have led to surprising results!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Countless souls have been lured along the Grand Line in pursuit of the legendary One Piece! Luffy D. Monkey is a young pirate with a dream: to prove the legend true and be king of them all!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his new companion Coby set sail in search of the infamous pirate hunter Zoro, rumored to be held captive at the Marine Base.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is in the line of fire after saving Zoro, and now tyrannical Captain Morgan is out for their heads! Zoro must decide if he will join forces with Luffy or die in captivity.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy recalls a time when Captain Red-Haired Shanks taught him a valuable lesson in friendship and set him on his quest to be King of the Pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy crosses paths with the clever thief Nami. A navigator on a quest to collect one hundred million berries, she’s perfect for Luffy’s new crew – except for the fact that Nami hates pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Having delivered a deadly blow to Captain Buggy’s pirates, Luffy and his companions need a place to recuperate. But the three are not in hiding very long before the Beast Tamer Mohji seeks them out.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the ongoing fight with Captain Buggy’s pirates, Zoro must face off with the Acrobat Cabaji while Luffy continues to do battle with the Pirate Clown himself.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the gang are on the run after the battle with Captain Buggy! With no place to go and nothing else to do, Nami finally agrees to join Luffy on his quest.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami arrive at an island hoping to obtain a ship and crew, but the three are quickly confronted with the blustering Captain Usopp – who has a connection to Luffy’s past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy follows Usopp to the mansion and encounters the brutal pirate Captain Kuro. The scoundrel plans to claim Kaya’s fortune and live the stolen life of luxury.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp spreads the word of Kuro’s evil plot and the impending pirate attack, but no one believes his warnings. The Straw Hat Pirates decide to help Usopp put a stop to the dastardly scheme.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and crew seek to best Captain Kuro, but they’ve prepared their defense on the wrong side of the island! All looks grim now that Usopp must face off against the Black Cat Pirates alone.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In an effort to save Usopp’s village, the Straw Hat Pirates seek to block the marauders’ path from the sea. With Luffy out of the battle, Zoro must face the fearsome Meowban Brothers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami manages to rescue Zoro’s missing swords and attempts to revive Luffy. With one of the Meowban brothers down, the other rages on even more fiercely than before!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp’s friends run away with the heiress Kaya. Jango races off after them, but not before sending Butchie into a berserk rage. As Zoro continues his battle, Luffy takes on Captain Kuro.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy battles with Kuro on the beach, while the Veggies (with Kaya in tow) flee Jango the Hypnotist.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kaya rewards the Straw Hat Pirates’ efforts to save her with a ship to call their own – the Going Merry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: On the legendary Treasure Island, Luffy and crew encounter strange animals and an even stranger man named Gaimon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the past, young Zoro sparred constantly with a girl named Kuina, but he could never claim victory. They vowed that one of them would someday be the world’s greatest swordsman – but tragedy intervened.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats need a cook among their crew, so they head to a nearby restaurant and meet a passionate Sous Chef named Sanji.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy witnesses the fighting prowess and compassionate nature of the Sous Chef Sanji. The good news: The Going Merry’s found a cook! The bad news: He has no intention of joining the crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The staff and patrons of the Baratie panic when Don Krieg arrives! The starving pirate begs for nourishment, only to find himself denied. Unable to see a wretch starve, Sanji steps in once again.

programme.desc: Night Man meets a former KGB assassin and senses a worse future for her.

programme.title: NightMan
programme.desc: A descendant of J. Edgar Hoover's unfreezes some of the worst gangsters of all time to wreak havoc.

programme.title: NightMan
programme.desc: Night Man's dad is being pursued by not one, but two vampires.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: A superhero is trapped by Magnus, and his lack of finesse affects the team's work. Elsewhere, Will and Declan go on the search for a creature that's loose in the city, after the discovery of an eggshell.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: A confused Dr. Magnus finds the Sanctuary and the surrounding city has been destroyed, but she has no idea how it happened.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Henry tries to determine why a seemingly docile domesticated abnormal suddenly turned violent after it attacks a research scientist.

programme.title: Sanctuary

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: While Sandoval (Von Flores) strikes a deal with the Atavus, Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) desperately tries to convince Hubble Urick (Frank Moore) about the existence of the deadly aliens.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) fights to destroy the Atavus as they begin a “joining” process that will create Human Atavan hybrids.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) joins forces with a down-and-out former reporter in order to convince the media of the existence of the Atavus.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is tricked by Rev and kidnapped. The crew finds an "unexpected ally" in a Collector.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Abyss has infected Beka. The crew must find a way to save her.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: After two years following a lead, the investigators finally have evidence in hand that could answer the 12-year-old mystery of what happened to Natalee Holloway.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Phoenix Coldon
programme.desc: Phoenix Coldon vanishes; investigative reporter, Shawndrea Thomas, and retired deputy Police Chief Joe Delia attempt to unravel the mysterious unsolved case in the hope of finding justice for Phoenix.

programme.title: Alexandria

programme.title: The Last Mystery of Cleopatra
programme.desc: Even from her grave, Egyptian Queen Cleopatra continues to mystify scholars and common people alike!

programme.desc: Join this marvelous investigation as Egyptologists and architects reveal the ranking of seven of Ancient Egypt’s most impressive stone giants.

programme.title: Ancient Gods of Egypt

programme.title: Egypt's Lost Queens
programme.desc: Prof. Joann Fletcher explores what it was like to be a woman of power in ancient Egypt. This programme brings to life the remarkable leadership and influence wielded by women whose levels of freedom were unique in the ancient world.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt Life and Death in the Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: In this first episode, we explore life in Ancient Egypt; the tightly packed houses where ordinary people lived, the village that was their home, how they dressed and what they ate.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt Life and Death in the Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: In this episode, we discover a strange and mysterious world: the Ancient Egyptian afterlife. To them, life was just a dress rehearsal for the perfect afterlife they were trying to reach.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: The Pyramid of Khufu is the only one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World which can still be seen in its original state. 146 metres high, 230 metres wide, and made from almost 2.5 million blocks, the Pyramid of Khufu breaks all the records.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: At the heart of Saqqara, the largest necropolis in Egypt, which was built around 2600 BC, is the Step Pyramid of Djoser. This pyramid, with its unusual design, is the first and most complex of all.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: Meidum is the least-known of the pyramids of Egypt, but the most mysterious. It stretches skywards and resembles a castle keep. Thanks to archaeology 2.0 and its drones, scientists can delve into the heart of this building.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: On the site of Dahshur, 40 km to the south of Cairo are two revolutionary monuments which would seem to be the first real pyramids. A link in the chain, which is essential to understanding the evolution in the building of pyramids.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: The whole world has its eyes riveted on the Pyramid of Khufu, in Egypt. Yet, on the Giza plateau, other architectural masterpieces stand up to the test of time: the sphinx, the lion with a human head, and the pyramids of Pharaohs Khafra and Menkaure.

programme.desc: A girl is home-alone on a full moon when she hears a noise outside... She bravely goes to see what it is and is confronted by two wolves escaping from inside her house!

programme.desc: Maddy learns that her parents have not been truthful about their species and realises Shannon and Tom are in danger… can she and Rhydian get to them in time?

programme.title: Wolfblood

programme.title: Merlin

programme.title: Space Phenomena

programme.title: Apollo 16: The Men, The Moon

programme.title: One Way Astronaut
programme.desc: The Mars One initiative plans to take four astronauts on a mission to Mars within 10 years. The astronauts leave, knowing they’ll never see everyone they love again.

programme.title: Countdown To Apollo
programme.desc: This episode captures Apollo’s most amazing video and audio moments caught on camera including the famous John F. Kennedy speech at Rice University where he inspires the nation to reach the moon.

programme.title: Countdown To Apollo
programme.desc: This episode features the important “firsts” of the Apollo program. From the first satellite launched by the Soviets called Sputnick; to the first man who flew in space named Yuri Gagarin.

programme.title: Countdown To Apollo
programme.desc: This episode chronicles several of the major decisions that define the Apollo mission including the decision to use a lunar module that detached from the command module rather than one giant spaceship landing on the moon.

programme.title: Countdown To Apollo
programme.desc: Three very different, uniquely talented men came together to form the crew of Apollo 11. Neil Armstrong, the skilled pilot, Buzz Aldrin, the astronaut with a Ph.D., and Mike Collins, the well-liked pilot of the command module.

programme.title: Countdown To Apollo
programme.desc: Before Apollo, there was Gemini, and before Gemini, there was the Mercury program. This episode examines Mercury, the first U.S. program to put a man in space.

programme.title: Countdown To Apollo
programme.desc: 400,000 people worked in putting a man on the moon. This episode looks at some of the prominent, and not so prominent players who played their parts.

programme.title: Countdown To Apollo
programme.desc: This episode examines some of the popular notions surrounding the Apollo program and discerns whether they are fact or fiction.

programme.title: Countdown To Apollo
programme.desc: Apollo was a “central project” that is generally thought to be one of the greatest achievements in the history of mankind. Experts debate the positive and negative aspects of Apollo with an eye towards deciding: Was it worth the enormous costs?

programme.title: Birth of Planet Earth
programme.desc: This eye-opening 4K documentary tracks the perilous path our planet took in its early years through advanced, data-driven, cinema-quality CGI. It asks: How did Earth become a living planet?

programme.title: Birth of a Black Hole
programme.desc: It was one of the greatest mysteries in modern science: a series of brief but extremely bright flashes of ultra-high energy light coming from somewhere out in space. What can we learn from the violent birth of a black hole?

programme.title: The Voyage of Curiosity
programme.desc: Its goal is to find out whether life could have existed on Mars, and whether the planet is safe enough for humans. For NASA scientists, landing on Mars required technologies never before used. Curiosity's journey was going to be complicated and dangerous.

programme.title: The Space Shuttle's Last Flight
programme.desc: As Atlantis completes its 135th and final mission, this definitive documentary charts the rise and fall of the most ambitious space programme ever undertaken, the space shuttle. For the past three decades since its first launch in 1981.

programme.title: Return To The Moon
programme.desc: Examining how renewed excitement about returning to the moon could lead to a colony.

programme.title: Exoplanets: Thousands Of New Worlds

programme.title: Laura McKenzie's Traveler

programme.title: Traveling with Denella Ri'chard

programme.title: Traveling with Denella Ri'chard
programme.desc: Come explore Miamiland that celebrates Miami's incredible outdoor environments. Miami also has a rich cultural and historical side to it, and with Denella, you will dive in and explore everything this exciting city has to offer travelers.

programme.title: Traveling with Denella Ri'chard
programme.desc: Welcome to Jamaica's South Coast. Here you and Denella will sip on the finest rums, take a thrilling swim in the iconic YS Falls, and cruise along the Black River. You will also get your fill of authentic and savory jerk cuisine, and more.

programme.title: Traveling with Denella Ri'chard

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una mujer llora cuando es detenida por la policía. Durante una parada sospechosa, un pasajero nervioso ayuda a los oficiales. Un sospechoso culpa a un extraño por lo que hay en su billetera.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una mujer que estaba dormida recibe a los agentes con mal humor. La policía responde a informes de un sospechoso y descubre mucho más. Una joven intenta evadir la cárcel haciendo promesas.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
